claim: 012 commit added invalidateEntityDensityCache() as a new post-mutation cache hook, wired inline in memory-save.ts (not through runPostMutationHooks), creating a scattered invalidation site phase 006 must absorb into statediff subscriber model

memory-bulk-delete.ts has two inline invalidateEntityDensityCacheAfterBulkDelete() callsites added by 012 remediation — this handler is absent from the phase 006 Files to Change table and must be added

clearDegreeCache() was added to runPostMutationHooks alongside clearGraphSignalsCache(); under statediff these should subscribe to graph-edge DiffAction batches from the causal-edges target sink, not fire on every operation

clearRelatedCache() (co-activation cache) was added to runPostMutationHooks by 012; coactivationCacheCleared field added to MutationHookResult; both should become typed statediff subscribers on memory_index row actions

Entity-density cache invalidation is absent from the scan path: memory-index.ts runScanInvalidationHooks calls runPostMutationHooks which does not call invalidateEntityDensityCache, leaving a 60s stale window after scan-triggered deletes that statediff subscriber model would fix

mutation-feedback.ts surfaces coactivationCacheCleared in buildMutationHookFeedback — once hooks become subscribers its output shape must reflect action-batch subscriber reporting; add to Files to Change
routing-telemetry.ts and shouldPreserveGraph routing override in query-router.ts are read-path additions from 012 with no write-side hooks; they have no bearing on statediff reconciliation scope
